text: I find myself in a modern, bright space, an intersection between technology and art, where glass and color frame my thoughts. As I enter the display titled 'R+D,' I am struck by the ambition of human curiosity—the drive to research and innovate, to redefine our coexistence with machines. I feel a sense of anticipation and reflection, aware that I stand at the threshold between what is known and what is possible. Here, surrounded by the products of inquiry, I am both inspired and humbled.
